# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

node {
    stage('Initialize') {
        // Initialize and get the parameters
        def externalUrl = params.EXTERNAL_URL
        def serverList = params.SERVERS.split(',')
        
        if(!externalUrl || !serverList) {
            error 'Please provide EXTERNAL_URL (from where to download artifacts) and SERVERS as a comma separated list'
        }
    }
    
    stage('Download Artifacts'){
        // Download the artifacts
        def wgetCommand = """
            for fileUrl in \$(curl -s ${externalUrl}); do
                wget \$fileUrl;
            done
        """ 
        
        script {
            sh "bash -c '$wgetCommand'"
        }
    }
    
    stage('Deploy to Production'){
        // Deploying to production servers
        for (server in serverList) {
            def deployCommand = """
                scp * ${server}:/path/to/deployment; 
            """
            
            script {
                sh "bash -c '$deployCommand'"
            }
        }
    }
}
